goal: Replace mock batch and readings data with live Supabase queries, wire Index, BrewSetup, FermentationMonitor, and GravityCurve.
summary:
Phase 2 — Core Data (Batches + Readings) complete.
1. useBatches.ts and useReadings.ts hooks created with full CRUD and query invalidation.
2. Index.tsx replaced mock batches with live data, added skeleton/empty states, next-action badges from batch_stages, and dynamic upcoming milestones.
3. BrewSetup.tsx wired the Start Fermentation button to useCreateBatch mutation and auto-navigates to the new batch.
4. FermentationMonitor.tsx loads real readings for the selected batch, computes live stats, and opens a Dialog form (RHF + Zod) wired to useCreateReading.
5. GravityCurve.tsx refactored to accept readings prop, render dynamically, and show empty state when no data.
6. Build verified successfully.
stepSummaries:
1. Create src/hooks/useBatches.ts with useBatches, useCreateBatch, useUpdateBatch, and useBatch(id). [verified]
  2. Create src/hooks/useReadings.ts with useReadings(batchId) and useCreateReading(). [verified]
  3. Modify src/pages/Index.tsx to use useBatches(), show loading skeleton and empty state, and compute next-action badges from batch_stages. [verified]
  4. Modify src/pages/BrewSetup.tsx to wire the wizard final step to useCreateBatch() and navigate to /batch/:newId on success. [verified]
  5. Modify src/pages/FermentationMonitor.tsx to use useReadings(batchId) and wire Log Reading to a Dialog form calling useCreateReading(). [verified]
  6. Modify src/components/GravityCurve.tsx to accept real readings via props instead of a static data array. [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 6 (npm run build) is syntactic verification that exercises TypeScript + Vite across all modified files. The actual Supabase queries cannot be end-to-end tested until the user executes SUPABASE_STEPS.md SQL, so the verifications for steps 1-5 are proxy (file existence/grep) confirming the hooks are wired. The build step proves all new modules integrate without type errors.
gateVerdicts.evidence: npm run build: 2583 modules transformed, built in 11.03s, exit code 0.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to replace mock batch and readings data with live Supabase queries and wire Index, BrewSetup, FermentationMonitor, and GravityCurve. All four targets are wired: Index uses useBatches; BrewSetup uses useCreateBatch; FermentationMonitor uses useReadings + useCreateReading; GravityCurve accepts readings prop. The build passes.
gateVerdicts.evidence: grep evidence from each step confirms the hooks are imported and used in their target files.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in Phase 2. All planned artifacts and wiring are complete.
